entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The social and cultural differences between men and women that influence agricultural research and breeding.

entities.name: GENDER-RESPONSIVE AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Agricultural research that considers and addresses the different needs and roles of men and women.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics.

entities.name: ANIMAL BREEDING
entities.description: The process of changing the traits of animals to produce desired characteristics.

entities.name: GENDER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A systematic approach to understanding the different roles, needs, and constraints of men and women in agriculture.

entities.name: GENDER-DIFFERENTIATED TRAITS
entities.description: Agricultural traits that are preferred or valued differently by men and women.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING CYCLE
entities.description: The sequence of steps involved in developing new plant varieties.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing parents or offspring with desired traits in breeding.

entities.name: TESTING EXPERIMENTAL VARIETIES
entities.description: The evaluation of new breeding lines in the field to assess performance.

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The process of multiplying and delivering seeds to farmers.

entities.description: A legume crop used for food and protein.

entities.name: COOKING TIME

entities.description: Soil lacking essential nutrients for plant growth.
